overall.description: A first-person walk through a cyberpunk city at night, beginning in a covered neon-lit market and transitioning to an open waterfront promenade with towering holographic advertisements. The scene features vibrant purple, cyan, and red neon lighting, futuristic vehicles passing by, and a mix of English and Japanese signage.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered market walkway with overhead canopy protection. Neon-lit food stalls line the right side while holographic tower advertisements are visible in the distance. The environment is sheltered with artificial neon lighting in purple and green tones.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered market into an open waterfront promenade under the massive TENGU hologram sign. The walkway curves along an elevated highway with vehicles passing on the right. A pedestrian in a green tank top approaches from the opposite direction as the camera follows the curved path.

The path passes under an elevated highway structure with large billboards visible ahead. Multiple vehicles including a white van and yellow taxi pass by as the camera moves forward.

segments.scene_description: Walking along the waterfront commercial district with a large anime character billboard prominently displayed ahead. A bright green sports car is parked on the right side while storefronts with neon signage line the path. The camera approaches a pedestrian walking ahead in the distance as the walkway continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered, neon-lit market into a sprawling, open-air cyberpunk waterfront district. It begins beneath a covered walkway canopy, passing purple and green food stalls while holographic towers loom in the distance. As the camera exits the shelter, the scene opens onto a curved promenade under a massive TENGU hologram, where the path bends alongside an elevated highway and a pedestrian in a green tank top passes by. The movement continues along the metal railings of the waterfront, shifting under the heavy concrete of the highway structure as white vans and yellow taxis stream past. Finally, the environment expands into a commercial district characterized by a towering anime billboard and a parked green sports car, moving toward distant pedestrians amidst a glow of vibrant storefront signage.
